html:
The Puffy Vest is a wearable Dress Item. It requires 1 Winter Koalefant Trunk, 8 Silk, and 2 Beefalo Wool to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. A Sewing Kit repairs 33.3% of its durability.

It restores 2 Sanity/min while worn.

The Puffy Vest is a tier 3 warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. It has an insulation factor of 240. It, along with the Beefalo Hat and the Hibearnation Vest in Reign of Giants, is one of the warmest Dress items in the game and perfect for Winter.

Trivia

  • The Puffy Vest was added in A Winter's Tale update.
  • The Puffy Vest is the warmer, improved version of the Breezy Vest.
  • Unlike the Breezy Vest, the Puffy Vest provides no protection from Wetness.
  • The Puffy Vest and Breezy Vest's appearance seems to resemble the Parka: a coat designed for protection from the cold, particularly in harsh environments.

Assets

  • Dropped
  • Equipped

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Willow wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Wendy wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • WX-78 wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Woodie wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Wes wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Maxwell wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Webber wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Walani wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Warly wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Wilbur wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Wilba wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Wormwood wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Wheeler wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Winona wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Wortox wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • Wurt wearing a Puffy Vest.
  • A Winter's Tale banner prominently featuring the Puffy Vest.

"trunkvest_winter"
“Winter survival gear.”
–Wilson
“Not as warm as a good fire, but still pretty good!”
–Willow
“Cozy nosy!”
–Wolfgang
“It may warm my body, but what of my spirit?”
–Wendy
“IMPROVED TEMPERATURE CONTROL HOUSING”
–WX-78
“Ample protection against the elements.”
–Wickerbottom
“This could stand up to the winters back home, eh?”
–Woodie
“It's so hard to look fashionable in the winter.”
–Maxwell
“Allows for proper air conduction.”
–Wagstaff
“The warm pelt öf a bested creature. A fine garment.”
–Wigfrid
“It'll keep us from catching a cold.”
–Webber
“I could fall asleep in this.”
–Walani
“Toasty and trendy.”
–Warly
“Clothes from a nose!”
–Woodlegs
“KEEPETH THY WINDS OUT”
–Wilba
“Warm”
–Wormwood
“I bet it'd be even warmer if there were sleeves.”
–Wheeler
“I wish it had sleeves.”
–Winona
“A puffy, poofy vest, oh yes.”
–Wortox
“Cozy...”
–Wurt
“A warm nose cozy.”
–Walter
“The hair is just as thick on the inside.”
–Wanda
The Puffy Vest is a wearable Dress Item. It requires 1 Winter Koalefant Trunk, 8 Silk, and 2 Beefalo Wool to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. A Sewing Kit repairs 33.3% of its durability.
It restores 2 Sanity/min while worn.
The Puffy Vest is a tier 3 warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. It has an insulation factor of 240. It, along with the Beefalo Hat and the Hibearnation Vest in Reign of Giants, is one of the warmest Dress items in the game and perfect for Winter.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Puffy Vest was added in A Winter's Tale update.
The Puffy Vest is the warmer, improved version of the Breezy Vest.
Unlike the Breezy Vest, the Puffy Vest provides no protection from Wetness.
The Puffy Vest and Breezy Vest's appearance seems to resemble the Parka: a coat designed for protection from the cold, particularly in harsh environments.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Áo Vest Phồng là một trang phục có thể mặc được. Nó cần 1 Thân Gấu Túi Mùa Đông, 8 Tơ và 2 Lông Bò Lai để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Bộ May vá sửa chữa 33,3% độ bền của nó.

A [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 33.3% of its durability. It restores 2 [[Sanity]]/min while worn.
